openrouter-free.note: Zero-cost router for prototypes; availability and selected model vary.

groq.note: Fast OpenAI-compatible option with account-specific free-plan limits.

huggingface.note: Small monthly experimentation credits; not an unlimited production free tier.

releaseGates: two-user abuse and rate-limit tests pass
daily budget and shutdown control configured
answers never trigger machine state directly
human review set covers machining, quality, people, and business questions
